notes: Runs perfectly out of the box. Chose to play with mouse control rather than deal with the weird mapping the game gave my Logitech joystick, but this is a common problem with all older Novalogic games that are pre-programed for specific flight sticks and don't allow re-mapping controls.
title: Comanche 4

notes: Runs out of the box with no audio or visual issues. Played the first(tutorial) mission to completion. Picks up my Logitech Extreme Pro joystick as well, but as with other NovaLogic games the default axis mapping dosn't match up (throttle gets set to my rudder!) and you can't change it in NL games. Thankfully this game plays very well with Mouse & keyboard.
title: Comanche 4
